svg.title: Three paths through the same stack
svg.desc: Three columns showing different routes that all begin from the same weights. Local Mac: Qwen, weights, GGUF Q4_K_M, llama.cpp, LM Studio as a GUI, Apple Silicon. Consumer NVIDIA: Gemma, weights, GGUF Q4_K_M, llama.cpp CUDA, Ollama as a CLI, consumer NVIDIA. Production: Llama, weights, FP8 or AWQ, vLLM or SGLang, an OpenAI-compatible API, enterprise NVIDIA. The interface row shows three flavors of interface: GUI, CLI, and API. The weights are shared and diverge at the format step.
svg.text: Same weights → diverge at format → and the interface differs too:
a person uses a GUI or CLI locally; code calls an API in production.
